sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of 'no' changes the meaning of the sentence, as 'noté' (I noticed) is replaced by 'no te' (I didn't to you), which makes the sentence incoherent.
Replacing 'noté' (I noticed) with 'te' (to you) removes the subject and action, making the sentence lose its intended meaning.
